qas.q: What is the first level of TCCC training that is intended to familiarize militarynonmedical personnel with TCCC concepts and basic lifesaving skills to ensure they are adequately prepared to render medical aid to a trauma casualty?
As a trainer, how can you ensure that standardized training is implemented?
qas.a: Delivering the content as provided by the Joint Trauma System (JTS)

qas.q: What is the purpose of the didactic PowerPoint presentations within the TCCC courses?
qas.a: To provide foundational information that sets the stage for TCCC training and the performance of skills within the correct context

qas.q: What is one of the MOST important aspects of preparing to deliver the standardized TCCC curriculum?
qas.a: Meeting as a training team to plan

qas.q: What is the ideal trainer-to-student ratio for ASM (didactic) training?
What is the ideal trainer-to-student ratio for ASM skills training?
What is the intended outcome when trainers are asked to "stick to the script and approved teaching material?"
qas.a: Trainers should teach the basic points and skills consistent with the current standards per the speaker notes, instructional videos, and skills cards that are provided

qas.q: is essential in developing technical proficiency and confidence during the performance of skills.

True or False: It is important that trainers reassure students and reinforce positive behaviors throughout training to facilitate learning and retention while adding stress when appropriate during assessment to build the confidence needed to save a life.
What is the ideal trainer-to-student ratio for the ASM assessment phase?
